title: gastrochilus obliquus
intro: Gastrochilus obliquus, also known as the Chinese Club Moss, is a type of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gastrochilus obliquus include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
